visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun and wearing a black apron over a beige tank top smiles brightly at the camera while holding a large white plate of stir-fried pork towards the lens. The background is a modern, brightly lit kitchen with white tiled walls and open shelving. (2) In a close-up shot, the woman uses silver chopsticks to slide sliced white onions and the white parts of green onions from a small white plate into a light-colored frying pan resting on an induction cooktop. (3) Thin slices of raw, marbled pork are added to the pan using chopsticks. The pan features decorative colorful dots on its exterior, and the lighting is bright and even across the cooking surface. (4) The woman is seen stir-frying the ingredients vigorously with chopsticks. Steam begins to rise from the pan as the meat transitions from raw pink to a cooked brown texture. (5) A green-capped bottle is shown pouring dark soy sauce into the pan, followed by a shot of the woman's hand sprinkling white salt from a small ceramic bowl over the food. (6) Fresh green scallion sections are added to the pan and tossed with the pork. The woman's hands are focused on the movement of the chopsticks to ensure even cooking and distribution of flavors. (7) The completed stir-fry is carefully poured from the pan onto a clean white serving plate. The visual focuses on the glossy texture of the meat and the vibrancy of the green onions. (8) The woman uses chopsticks to place golden-brown roasted garlic cloves on top of the pork as a final garnish. The dish is presented on a white countertop under soft, warm indoor light. (9) A final macro shot showcases the finished plate of 'Stir-fried Pork with Garlic and Onions' with steam rising from it. Stylized text appears on the left side of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 洋蔥. (2) [Subtitle]: 蔥白. (3) [Subtitle]: 豬肉片. (4) [Subtitle]: 爆炒. (5) [Subtitle]: 鹽巴. (6) [Subtitle]: 醬油. (7) [Subtitle]: 蔥段. (8) [Subtitle]: 拌炒. (9) [Subtitle]: 盛盤. (10) [Subtitle]: 蒜頭裝飾. (11) [Subtitle]: 香蒜洋蔥豬肉片. [Subtitle]: Stir-fried Pork with Garlic and Onions.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator cooking in a kitchen environment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair tied in a high bun, wearing a beige tank top and a black apron with a colorful dotted pattern.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white tiled walls, light wood cabinetry, a sink, an induction cooktop, and shelves containing small decorative items like pink flowers.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, upbeat acoustic guitar and synth-pop background music track. The tempo is brisk and energetic, with a clean studio recording quality. No vocals are present. (2) Frequent 'whoosh' sound effects are synchronized with visual cuts, creating a sharp rhythmic interplay between the visuals and the music. The BGM maintains a steady, percussive beat throughout the sequence. (3) Subtle sizzling sound effects are layered under the music during the stir-frying scenes, providing a representational acoustic texture for the heat in the pan. (4) Small, percussive 'pop' or 'click' sound effects occasionally emphasize the addition of ingredients or transitions. (5) The music continues at its original energy level until the end of the video, where it fades out smoothly with no abrupt changes in tonal structure.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Prep -> Cooking -> Seasoning -> Plating -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick, visually engaging cooking tutorial for a stir-fried pork dish, emphasizing simplicity and appetizing results through fast-paced editing and bright visuals.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished, social-media-friendly cooking montage with traditional Chinese subtitles, likely targeting a Taiwanese or Hong Kong audience.
